chapters.title: Chapter 1
chapters.notes: Lessons 1A/1B/2A/2B: ii-V7-I progression, improvising over diatonic ii-V7-I, diatonic arpeggios

chapters.title: Chapter 2
chapters.notes: Lessons 1A-7A altered chords (7b5, 7#5, 7b9, 7#9, combined alterations, other ii-V7-I fingerings) with B lessons on arpeggios and creating lines

chapters.title: Chapter 3
chapters.notes: Lessons 1A-4A: Comping Swing, Latin, Funk, Ballads

chapters.title: Chapter 4
chapters.notes: Lessons 1A-4A: Chord Connections across string sets; B lessons on Learning Licks

chapters.title: Chapter 5
chapters.notes: Lesson 1A Blues Progression; Lesson 1B Soloing Over Blues

chapters.title: Chapter 6
chapters.notes: Lesson 1A Rhythm Changes; Lesson 1B Soloing Over Rhythm Changes

chapters.title: Chapter 7
chapters.notes: Lesson 1A Turnaround; Lesson 1B Soloing Over Turnarounds

chapters.title: Chapter 8
chapters.notes: Lesson 1A Chord Solo (Foggy); Lesson 1B Single-Note Solo (Single Notes in the Mist)

chapters.title: Coda—A Medley of Suggestions and Musical Concepts
chapters.notes: Tone, practicing, single-string practice, singing along, listening
